query:
-- 1. Add new Python-output columns to payroll_records
ALTER TABLE payroll_records
  ADD COLUMN crdts VARCHAR(100) AFTER agentCode,
  ADD COLUMN alias VARCHAR(100) AFTER crdts,
  ADD COLUMN ot1x5Hours DECIMAL(8,2) DEFAULT 0 AFTER workingHours,
  ADD COLUMN ot2xHours DECIMAL(8,2) DEFAULT 0 AFTER ot1x5Hours,
  ADD COLUMN ot3xHours DECIMAL(8,2) DEFAULT 0 AFTER ot2xHours,
  ADD COLUMN commissionEgp DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0 AFTER ot3xHours,
  ADD COLUMN qualityDeductions DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0 AFTER commissionEgp,
  ADD COLUMN attendanceDeductions DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0 AFTER qualityDeductions,
  ADD COLUMN totalDeductions DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0 AFTER attendanceDeductions,
  ADD COLUMN qualityDetail TEXT AFTER netPay,
  ADD COLUMN attendanceDetail TEXT AFTER qualityDetail,
  ADD COLUMN paymentStatus ENUM('pending','paid') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL AFTER attendanceDetail,
  ADD COLUMN paidAt BIGINT AFTER paymentStatus;

-- 2. Add orientationShown to workforce_agents
ALTER TABLE workforce_agents
  ADD COLUMN orientationShown BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL;

-- 3. Create agent_violations table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agent_violations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  agentCode VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  crdts VARCHAR(100),
  date VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  category ENUM('attendance','quality') NOT NULL,
  hours DECIMAL(6,2),
  deduction DECIMAL(10,2),
  description TEXT,
  status ENUM('pending','approved','rejected') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  approvedBy VARCHAR(255),
  approvedAt BIGINT,
  month VARCHAR(7),
  uploadedAt BIGINT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- 4. Create agent_performance table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agent_performance (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  agentCode VARCHAR(100),
  crdts VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  alias VARCHAR(100),
  month VARCHAR(7) NOT NULL,
  loginHours DECIMAL(8,2),
  revenue DECIMAL(12,2),
  cost DECIMAL(12,2),
  profit DECIMAL(12,2),
  revPerHour DECIMAL(10,2),
  uploadedBy VARCHAR(255),
  uploadedAt BIGINT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- 5. Create adherence_log table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS adherence_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  agentCode VARCHAR(100),
  crdts VARCHAR(100),
  alias VARCHAR(100),
  date VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  month VARCHAR(7),
  type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  hours DECIMAL(6,2),
  deduction DECIMAL(10,2),
  status ENUM('pending','approved','rejected') DEFAULT 'approved' NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  uploadedBy VARCHAR(255),
  uploadedAt BIGINT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- 6. Create quality_log table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quality_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  agentCode VARCHAR(100),
  crdts VARCHAR(100),
  alias VARCHAR(100),
  date VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  month VARCHAR(7),
  type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  score DECIMAL(5,2),
  penalty DECIMAL(10,2),
  notes TEXT,
  uploadedBy VARCHAR(255),
  uploadedAt BIGINT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
